reason: This caption best balances the required intimate, observational tone with a light chunibyo touch. Elegantly weaves multiple sensory details (touch, sound) and the weather variable
Ending is softly unresolved, matching the desired 'private note to self' tone
Avoids blocked phrases and repetitive openings from recent history
